dashboard.title: Page Builder
dashboard.subtitle: GrapesJS + Nuxt 4
dashboard.noWebsitesTagline: Create your first website to get started building with GrapesJS.
dashboard.modalDescription: Choose a name for your website. A URL slug will be generated automatically.
dashboard.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete {name}?
dashboard.deleteWarning: All content will be permanently removed.

editor.clearConfirm: Clear the canvas? This cannot be undone.

defaultTemplate.title: Welcome to your new website
defaultTemplate.subtitle: This is a default template to help you get started. You can edit any element by clicking on it, or drag new blocks from the left panel.
defaultTemplate.feature1Text: Every element can be styled and positioned according to your needs.
defaultTemplate.feature2Text: Your website will look great on all devices automatically.
